scope_statement: Read-only public-signal analysis. The auditor does not detect profile badges and does not access private data.

rules.name: Pull Shark
rules.method: GitHub issue search for public merged pull requests authored by the username.
limitations: Search results can omit private activity and may not match GitHub's internal attribution rules.
The result is a progress signal, not proof that the badge is visible.

rules.name: Quickdraw
rules.method: No reliable aggregate public API exposes qualifying close intervals and resulting badge visibility.
limitations: Issue and pull-request timestamps can be inspected individually, but the exact award contract is unpublished.
The auditor does not encourage repeated artificial issue activity.

rules.name: YOLO
rules.method: Public APIs do not provide a reliable account-level badge result linked to review state.
limitations: Review objects, branch rules, and merger identity require case-level inspection.
Absence of an approval is not sufficient proof of award visibility.

rules.name: Pair Extraordinaire
rules.method: Public APIs do not expose a complete account-level count of qualifying co-authored merged pull requests.
limitations: Final merged history and linked email attribution must be inspected.
Private and rewritten history is unavailable.

rules.name: Galaxy Brain
rules.method: GitHub's public REST API does not provide a complete account-level accepted-answer count.
limitations: Accepted and verified states must not be conflated.
GraphQL access would require a user token and is intentionally not requested.

rules.name: Starstruck
rules.method: Maximum stargazer count among up to the first 100 public repositories owned by the username.
limitations: Organization-owned, transferred, private, and repositories beyond the first 100 may be omitted.
Current stars do not prove when or whether an award was granted.

rules.name: Public Sponsor
rules.method: Public sponsorship badge visibility is not available through the unauthenticated REST user response.
limitations: The auditor never requests financial or sponsorship account data.
Users must inspect their own public profile and sponsorship visibility settings.

rules.name: Arctic Code Vault Contributor
rules.method: Historical qualification depends on the 2020 archive snapshot and visible profile history.
limitations: The event is retired and cannot be reproduced through new activity.
Public API metadata does not expose the complete archived qualification list.

rules.name: Mars 2020 Contributor
rules.method: Historical qualification depends on contributions to mission-linked repositories and visible profile history.
limitations: The complete internal qualification list is not a current public API contract.
